English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Barbara Booker collection
Booker, Barbara.
4752
1.3 cubic feet. 1.3 cubic feet.
1935-2002. Correspondence, Memorabilia, Printed Materials Includes records pertaining to various track and cross-country skiing races and events, including meet results, workout schedules and memorabilia. Collection material in English 6853405
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
March 2010
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, March 2010
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Barbara Booker was an avid runner, camper, hiker, triathlete and cross country skier and the first woman president of the Finger Lakes Runners Club. Under her direction the club began to focus on open competition and women's running in road races and marathons.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes records pertaining to various track and cross-country skiing races and events, including meet results, workout schedules and memorabilia.
Cite As:
Barbara Booker collection, #4752. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cross-country skiing. Marathon running. Running -- Training. Running. Finger Lakes Runners Club Cornell Masters Mile
